name: Add a Discount / Coupon
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you're looking for the three simple discount coupons (percentage off, free shipping, and free gift) you will find them in "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1537-quickly-add-a-simple-discount-coupon", "children": [{"text": "this article"}]}, {"text": ". There are 3 parts to a discount coupon:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Naming & Visibility"}], "data-id": "1"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To create a discount and add the basic details:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Marketing", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Discounts / Coupons", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If you don't have any discounts setup, click "}, {"text": "Create A New Discount", "bold": true}, {"text": ". If you do have discounts already, click "}, {"text": "Add Discount", "bold": true}, {"text": " in the bottom right hand corner."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddaDiscountCoupon1.05T5g00000hx2UxEAI.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddaDiscountCoupon1.05T5g00000hx2UxEAI.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Create New Discount", "bold": true}, {"text": ". For information on how to add one of the three simple discounts see "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1537-quickly-add-a-simple-discount-coupon", "children": [{"text": "this article"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddaDiscountCoupon2.05T5g00000hwzvnEAA.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddaDiscountCoupon2.05T5g00000hwzvnEAA.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a "}, {"text": "Title", "bold": true}, {"text": " that customers will see in the cart and checkout, and a "}, {"text": "Discount Key", "bold": true}, {"text": " to identify the discount in the database. Set the discount to "}, {"text": "Active", "bold": true}, {"text": ", and optionally add a "}, {"text": "Subtitle", "bold": true}, {"text": " as well."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddaDiscountCoupon3.05T5g00000hx1z9EAA.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddaDiscountCoupon3.05T5g00000hx1z9EAA.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Discount Rules"}], "data-id": "2"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The discount rules let you define the criteria the customer's order must meet to qualify for the , along with what kind of discount you will give them. To create discount rules:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the discount rules, select the "}, {"text": "Condition(s)", "bold": true}, {"text": " that must be met for the discount to apply. For example, if you select "}, {"text": "Coupon Code", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click "}, {"text": "Add", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Enter in the code that customers must enter into the checkout page to receive the discount. Each condition is covered in more depth, along with adding multiple conditions, in the table below. Once complete, click "}, {"text": "Done", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": Use this with a product or category discount and the "}, {"text": "Max Qty Allowed", "bold": true}, {"text": " field to make a buy X amount for $Y."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Pay a maximum of $50 on Adidas sneakers when you buy 2 or more pairs."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Shipping cost cap"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Set an upper limit for the cost of shipping on the order"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Don\u2019t pay more than $20 for postage with the coupon CHEAPSHIPPING"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-5c7bf328"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "See advanced options", "bold": true}, {"text": " link beneath each rule to deactivate the rule, set the sort order, or minimum order amount for the rule."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Additional Rules"}], "data-id": "3"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Additional rules let you set limits on the discount offer. For example, set the start and end date for a stocktake sale so that it finishes on June 30th at midnight. See the table below for options in the additional rules and advanced options available."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddaDiscountCoupon6.05T5g00000hx3fREAQ.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddaDiscountCoupon6.05T5g00000hx3fREAQ.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Additional rule"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Description"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Use start and end dates"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Toggle this setting to configure a start and end date for your promotion. It won\u2019t be live until the start date, and will automatically end on the end date."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sort order"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Set the order conditions and discounts are applied when using multiple discounts and conditions. This is important if you want to add in exclusion conditions (e.g. Category is not Sale Items) so that they take priority over any others.\u00a0"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Exclude products already on sale"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Products that are on sale won\u2019t be eligible for this discount."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Usage Policy"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Choose if coupons can be used once per customer or multiple times. Note that one time usage will only be enforced if the customer logs in, otherwise the usage can't be tracked."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Max discount allowed"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Set a maximum dollar amount that the discount won\u2019t exceed."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Use alongside other promotions"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Choose if products that are already on promotion will be eligible for the discount."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Automatically apply discount"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Set this to yes if you didn\u2019t include a condition for a coupon code. You can also set it to yes if you want anyone to get the discount, even if they don\u2019t have the code."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Max repeats"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Caps the amount of times the discount can be applied."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Max quantity allowed"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "On product discounts this will limit how many products will be discounted."}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-aee8ee1d"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Turn on the "}, {"text": "Pop-up", "bold": true}, {"text": " and enter a message to let customers know they have qualified for a discount."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddaDiscountCoupon7.05T5g00000hx3fWEAQ.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AddaDiscountCoupon7.05T5g00000hx3fWEAQ.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your discount is now created."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "We recommend testing your discount to make sure it functions as expected, so that customers will receive the discount only when you want them to."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
